Home / Services / Commercial Painting

Commercial Painting

Professional finishes that elevate your business space while minimizing operational disruptions.

From Monument Circle offices to Carmel retail centers, Indianapolis businesses deserve commercial painting services that understand local market expectations. We specialize in efficient, high-quality applications that respect your operating hours—often completing projects overnight or in phases to avoid customer disruption.

Our commercial team addresses the specific needs of Central Indiana businesses: durable epoxy floors for winter salt tracking in entryways, mold-resistant paints for restaurant kitchens in our humid summers, and vibrant accent walls that pop under Indiana's variable natural light. We're experienced navigating downtown Indianapolis' historic building requirements while delivering modern performance.

For healthcare facilities in Fishers or educational buildings in Noblesville, we use antimicrobial paints. For automotive businesses near the Speedway, we apply chemical-resistant coatings. Every project begins with a detailed schedule and ends with a sparkling space that reflects your brand's professionalism.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: After-hours assessment to minimize business disruption
  2. 02 Step 2: Surface preparation tailored to your industry's specific wear patterns
  3. 03 Step 3: Strategic application scheduling (overnight, weekends, or phased approaches)
  4. 04 Step 4: Final inspection with attention to high-traffic area durability

Benefits

  • Minimized business interruption through flexible scheduling
  • Specialized coatings for different commercial environments
  • Improved customer perception with fresh, professional spaces
  • Long-term value from durable finishes that reduce maintenance costs

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you paint during our normal business hours?

We offer low-odor options and containment systems for daytime work, but typically recommend after-hours projects for retail and office spaces to avoid customer impact.

Do you provide touch-up services between full repaints?

Yes, we maintain color formulas for clients and can schedule minor touch-ups to address wear in high-traffic areas—common in Indianapolis' harsh winters.

How do you handle painting in food service establishments?

We use NSF-approved paints and follow strict containment protocols, with experience working around health department inspection schedules in Marion and Hamilton counties.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with commercial painting? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-pai-r94
